title: Add helm-validate CI job with lint and template tests
summary: Adds a helm-validate CI job gated by a new 'helm' path filter. The job runs helm lint, helm template with 4 value override scenarios, and helm-unittest with 5 test suites (36 tests total). CI workflow additions are clean — no existing jobs modified. All SHA-pinned actions match existing conventions. All 5 test suites pass, helm lint exits 0, and all 4 template scenarios render successfully. One minor docs inaccuracy found.

tests_checklist.item: All 5 helm-unittest test suites pass (36/36 tests)
Deployment tests cover image, replicas, resources, securityContext, probes, args, webhook volume mount, webhook disabled
ClusterRole tests cover all 14 RBAC rules with correct verbs
ClusterRoleBinding tests cover roleRef and ServiceAccount subject
Service tests cover metrics port, conditional webhook port (enabled/disabled)
Webhook tests cover Mutating/Validating configs, cert-manager annotation, absent when disabled

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing CI job conventions (SHA-pinned actions, timeout, needs/if)
azure/setup-helm SHA matches existing helm-push job (dda3372f)
helm-unittest plugin version pinned to v0.7.1 (not @latest)

security_checklist.item: No secrets or credentials in workflow additions
No elevated permissions required (read-only default sufficient)

architecture_checklist.item: helm-validate is independent gate job (needs only changes, no E2E dependency)
Path filter correctly scoped to operators/keystone/helm/**
Helm output wired through all 3 required paths (dorny filter, tag-push force, non-tag else)
Job placement follows existing DAG structure

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No duplicated code across test files

fail_fast_checklist.item: helm lint runs before template rendering
Each template scenario is a separate invocation (fails independently)

issues_found.description: Documentation states 'All 12 RBAC rule blocks' but the actual clusterrole.yaml template has 14 rules and the clusterrole_test.yaml correctly asserts count: 14. The docs reference is stale — it predates the CC-0037 (policy/poddisruptionbudgets), CC-0038 (autoscaling/horizontalpodautoscalers) additions.
issues_found.fix: Change 'All 12 RBAC rule blocks with correct verbs' to 'All 14 RBAC rule blocks with correct verbs' in the Unit test suites table.
issues_found.evidence: | `clusterrole_test.yaml` | `clusterrole.yaml` | All 12 RBAC rule blocks with correct verbs |

suggested_improvements: Consider adding a serviceaccount_test.yaml to cover the conditional ServiceAccount creation logic (serviceAccount.create=true/false, serviceAccount.name override) — currently only tested indirectly via helm template scenario 3.
next_steps: Fix the '12 RBAC rule blocks' count in docs/reference/ci-workflow.md:262 to '14 RBAC rule blocks'
